title: Fix no_std RNG usage in lichen-oscore EDHOC
description: EdhocInitiator::new and EdhocResponder::new at ~lines 312 and 752 currently use rand_core::OsRng which ties to getrandom/std. Analyze usage, update to accept generic RngCore + CryptoRng param for idiomatic no_std support. Update tests, Cargo.toml features, docs. Check integration points in lichen-link, lichen-rpl, lichen-node.
close_reason: Completed all child tasks: generic RNG constructors, test updates, Cargo.toml no_std fixes. Tests and checks pass. No further integration changes required at this time.
